scope: Read-only Brevo workflow UI and analytics availability/status check after remaining lead-flow QA.
safetyBoundaries: No Brevo workflow, contact, list, template, CRM record, sender, form, or attribute was edited.
No Brevo workflow was activated or paused by this pass.
No GA4, GTM, Meta, Google Ads, Vercel, Netlify, GitHub issue, or Notion setting was changed.
No secrets, QA identity details, contact IDs, CRM IDs, transactional message IDs, cookies, auth headers, API keys, or environment values are included.

brevoWorkflowUi.verificationStatus: Verified from read-only Brevo Automations UI for visible list rows only.

visibleRowsSummary.notes: Visible in Brevo Automations UI. Internal row IDs and counts are intentionally omitted.

riskNotes: Earlier handoff notes expected Tracking Audit Nurture to remain inactive until approved; current read-only UI shows it active.
The UI row check did not open workflow editors or inspect every trigger/step/suppression rule.
Do not edit, pause, activate, deactivate, duplicate, or rebuild workflows without explicit user approval.

metaEventsManager.summary: ATD Meta Events Manager context was visible in Chrome, but the read-only event-row extraction timed out before usable Lead/Subscribe/browser/server deduplication evidence was captured.

ga4.summary: GA4 event rows were not safely verified in this pass. No GA4 settings were changed and no new events were generated for analytics testing.

gtm.summary: GTM event/debug evidence was not safely verified in this pass. No GTM tags, triggers, variables, preview state, or container settings were changed.

recommendedNextActions: Treat active Brevo workflows as a launch-readiness risk until the user decides whether to pause, inspect, or leave them active.
Perform a separate read-only Brevo workflow detail review only after explicit approval, focusing on triggers, list entry criteria, suppression/exclusion, duplicate enrollment, and email steps.
Perform GA4/GTM/Meta event verification in a stable read-only session or capture screenshots manually from the correct ATD browser profile; do not generate new events unless separately approved.
